content: All requested components are implemented: `generate_primes(limit)` returns primes up to the limit using a sieve; `CircularBuffer` of size 5 correctly overwrites the oldest entry and `get_all()` yields items from oldest to newest; the integration script `heavy_test.py` imports these modules, computes primes ≤ 50, fills the buffer, and prints its final state. Execution produces `[31, 37, 41, 43, 47]`, confirming the buffer holds the five most recent primes. All tasks in `./heavy_tasks.txt` are satisfied.
